title: heliosperma veselskyi subsp. iskense
intro: Heliosperma veselskyi subsp. iskense, also known as Iskander's rock jasmine or Iskander's rock jasmine (Heliosperma veselskyi subsp. iskense), is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Saxifragaceae. It is commonly found in the mountainous regions of the Balkan Peninsula. Traditionally, Heliosperma veselskyi subsp. iskense has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The plant can be used to prepare herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to provide health benefits like reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune system function.
